title: Profile Settings
accountSubtitle: Manage your public identity, email, and default match preferences in one place.
usernameHint: 3-24 characters. Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

usernameErrors.characters: Use only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

emailMaskedHint: Your email stays hidden until you choose to edit it.
emailEditHint: We will send a confirmation link to your new email address.
emailAutoDeletionNotice: This account will be deleted {{timeLeft}} if you do not verify your email.
publicProfileHint: Allow other users to view your profile and stats.
chatEnabledHint: You can disable chat for all matches.
settingsSavedWithEmailChange: Changes saved. Check your new email to confirm the update.
passwordSectionHint: Use your current password to set a new one.
newPasswordHint: Use 8-72 characters with at least one letter and one number.

passwordErrors.length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
passwordErrors.format: Password must include letters and numbers.
passwordErrors.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from your current password.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.subtitle: Deleting your account is permanent and will remove your profile access.
danger.passwordRequired: Enter your password to delete your account.

avatarEditor.title: Adjust avatar
avatarEditor.subtitle: Move and zoom your photo to see how it will look as a round avatar.
avatarEditor.hint: Drag the photo to reposition it inside the circle.
